per_outcome.operationalization: Self-reported frequency of online insurance purchases by survey respondents
Respondent-stated preference among distribution channels (agent-based, online direct, brokers, etc.)
Respondent rating of price as a factor in choosing insurance distribution channel
Respondent evaluation of the relative appeal of online versus traditional insurance purchasing methods
Respondent-reported factors (e.g., price, trust, convenience) affecting channel choice
Respondent-identified barriers or concerns that discourage online insurance purchasing
